title: fix(nova-reel): use FetchHttpHandler for Bedrock + S3 in Workers
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Unjamming the projector
gist.blurb: Nova Reel video generation was tripping over some invisible wires in the cloud. We swapped out the faulty cables, and your AI videos are flowing smoothly again.
gist.summary: Resolved a compatibility issue with AWS Bedrock and Cloudflare Workers that was causing Nova Reel video generations to fail.
gist.impact: Video generation using the Nova Reel model is fully operational again, returning successful MP4s instead of server errors.
gist.visual_concept: The PR fixes a broken video generation model (Nova Reel). Visuals should include a retro film projector or film reels being repaired. Polly the bee acts as the mechanic fixing the projector, while the Monitor Robot happily displays the resulting video.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny mechanic's cap, using a wrench to fix a glowing retro film projector. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, its screen happily displaying a playing video. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
